# comfyui_audio_equalizer3_band (Resource)

(EXPERIMENTAL) ComfyUI AudioEqualizer3Band node — Audio Equalizer (3-Band) [audio]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `audio` (String) Input: AUDIO (link)
- `high_freq` (Number) Input: INT default: 5000
- `high_gain_db` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 0
- `low_freq` (Number) Input: INT default: 100
- `low_gain_db` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 0
- `mid_freq` (Number) Input: INT default: 1000
- `mid_gain_db` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 0
- `mid_q` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 0.707

### Read-Only

- `audio_output` (String) Output: AUDIO (slot 0)
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
